Estación de servicio adherida al ACA

(Translated by Google)
Service station adhering to the ACA

reviews.comment:
En Atencion al.Cliente, por seguros ACA, hay una mujer muy muy antipatica. Su cara es el fiel reflejo que no tiene ganas de atender a los clientes y su actitud es peor. La proxima le tomo el nombre. Pero quedé estupecta, porque no solo no me solucionó el problema, sino que me trató muy muy mal.

(Translated by Google)
At Customer Service for ACA insurance, there's a very, very unfriendly woman. Her face clearly shows she has no desire to help customers, and her attitude is even worse. Next time, I'll get her name. But I was stunned because not only did she not solve my problem, but she treated me very, very badly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnd2ZIRER3EAE
